content.en:
Wow!

A forbidden silk thread crossed Daoshan Daozu's neck and directly cut off his head.

Daoshan Daozu regenerated a head, but was pierced by a spear from the Forbidden Hall Master.

In this way, the seriously injured Daoshan Dao Ancestor was severely injured by the Forbidden Hall Lord again and again, and he had no power to resist at all, and now he was just relying on his recovery ability and life-saving means to consume it again and again.

But as time passed, his recovery slowed down and he ran out of life-savers.

In the blink of an eye, three years have passed.

For the Dao Ancestors, just three years is nothing.

However, due to their great battle, countless universes in this vicinity were shattered one after another, and even many True Ancestor-level powerhouses in the Dao Mountain Realm knew that something was wrong and escaped from this area one by one.

Obviously, they also knew that the Dao Mountain Realm was probably not guaranteed, and they were not optimistic about the Dao Mountain Realm at all.

Honor is compared to life, and these true ancestors chose honor.

Of course, there are not many true ancestors in the Dao Mountain Realm, most of the True Ancestors are in the Xuanxu Ancient Realm, and only some True Ancestors who have just been promoted or are preparing to be promoted to Dao Ancestors have stayed in the Dao Mountain Realm.

"Come and save me!"

Daoshan Dao Ancestor put his hope on those Dao Ancestors in Dao Mountain, hoping that they could come to the rescue of him.

Whoa!!!

Three Quadruple Heavenly Dao Ancestors came over and wanted to rescue Dao Mountain Dao Ancestors.

They didn't expect to be able to defeat the Forbidden Hall Master, that wasn't realistic.

They only hoped to drag the hall master of the Forbidden Palace, so that Daoshan Dao Ancestor could ease down and escape for his life.

After all, if Daoshan Daozu fell, Daoshan would be completely gone, and they would not be able to survive, so Daoshan Daozu must be saved.

However, they overestimated their own strength and underestimated the strength of the Forbidden Hall Master.

Puff puff puff!!

Several forbidden spears instantly sliced through the void, nailing several Quadruple Heavenly Dao Ancestors into the chaotic void.

"Get out, just a few of you Quadruple Heavenly Dao Ancestors also want to save people?"

The Hall Master of the Forbidden Hall sneered.

Now for him, the Quadruple Heavenly Dao Ancestor is an ant, except for the Quadruple Heavenly Dao Ancestor like the Void Heaven Dao Ancestor, who is still a little interesting, the other Quadruple Heavenly Dao Ancestors are not qualified to block him a few moves at all.

After several Quadruple Heavenly Dao Ancestors were seriously injured, they didn't dare to save Dao Mountain Dao Ancestors anymore, but ran away as fast as they could.

That's right, they ran!

It's not that they're not afraid of death, but they felt that there was some hope for saving Daoshan Daozu before, so they went to save it, maybe they could escape.

But now, there is no hope for the Dao Ancestor of the Salvation Mountain, and he still has to be sent to death?

"You ......"

Daoshan Daozu said angrily.

If all the Dao Ancestors came to save him and gave his life at all costs, he really had any hope of escaping.

However, this is not very realistic!

With the escape of several Quadruple Heavenly Dao Ancestors, the other Dao Ancestors also had no intention of fighting one by one, and began to flee.

It didn't take long for Daoshan Daozu to hold on.

With the penetration of the last forbidden spear, the vitality of Daoshan Daozu was annihilated, and he completely fell and died.

After the hall master of the Forbidden Hall killed the Dao Ancestors of Dao Mountain, he began to kill the Dao Ancestors of Dao Mountain.

Although some Dao Ancestors ran away, there were still many Dao Ancestors who were entangled by the Dao Ancestors of the Forbidden Palace.

The hall master of the Forbidden Hall showed an invincible posture, and he could kill a second or third Heavenly Dao Ancestor in almost a few moves.

Soon, the Dao Ancestors of Dao Mountain were killed by the Forbidden Hall Master more than a hundred, and the other Dao Ancestors fled.

In this regard, the hall master of the Forbidden Hall did not care.

The purpose of his trip was not to prepare to kill the Dao Ancestors of Guang Dao Mountain, his goal was only to kill Dao Shan Dao Ancestor, and now that Dao Mountain Dao Ancestor has fallen, the biggest goal has been completed.

"Kill all the descendants of Daoshan Dao Ancestor, and if anyone escapes, they will be wanted in the Daoshan Realm!"

The Lord of the Forbidden Hall gave the order.

Rumble!!!!

Many Forbidden Hall Masters slaughtered into the Daoshan Realm and launched a new round of slaughter, killing the Daoshan Realm to the point that corpses were all over the field, the mountains and rivers were shattered, and countless True Monarchs and Heavenly Monarchs fell and died one after another.

This kill is enough to kill for ten years!

Of course, in the end, the Forbidden Hall did not destroy the Dao Mountain Realm, and with a little transformation, it used this place as a stronghold of the Forbidden Palace.

------------

Void Heaven.

The Void Heaven Dao Ancestor was very surprised when he heard the news that the Dao Mountain Realm had been breached by the Forbidden Palace.

"Daoshan Dao Ancestor has actually fallen!"

The Void Heaven Dao Ancestor sighed.

Once, Daoshan Daozu was also the target of his pursuit, and it was also a big mountain in the hearts of countless powerhouses in the Daoshan realm, and it was a majestic mountain that was difficult to climb.

But now, the mountain has collapsed, representing the arrival of a new era!

"It seems that the hall master of the Forbidden Hall has broken through to the realm of the Five Heavenly Dao Ancestors, otherwise there is no way to kill the Dao Mountain Dao Ancestor!"

The Void Heaven Dao Ancestor muttered.

And now he has reached the peak realm of the Quadruple Heavens, and he also has a clear path to break through the Quadruple Heavenly Dao Ancestor, and when his Supreme Sword Dao is more profound, he can forcibly break into the Quadruple Heavenly Dao Ancestor realm with the help of a few treasures, and with the help of the power of the Supreme Sword Dao, he is not weak in the ranks of the Fivefold Heavenly Dao Ancestor, and may be comparable to the previous Daoshan Dao Ancestor.

Xuanxu Ancient Realm.

Tianhai Sect.

The true ancestors of the Tianhai Sect knew that the Daoshan forces had been destroyed by the Forbidden Palace, and they were immediately furious, but they had no idea of avenging Daoshan.

After all, the Dao Ancestors of the Tianhai Sect can't be born easily at the moment, and besides, the Dao Mountain has been destroyed, even if the Dao Mountain power of the Xuanxu Ancient Realm is still there, the value is far less than before.

Therefore, Tianhai Sect's anger was just vented internally, and there was no reaction to the outside world.

And the Daoshan True Kingdom opened up by the Daoshan forces in the Xuanxu Ancient Realm has also become low-key, and all the True Ancestors have returned to the True Country and strictly guarded the True Kingdom, for fear that the True Ancestors of the Forbidden Hall will attack.

But they thought too much, and the true ancestors of the Forbidden Hall would not attack them, after all, the strength of the two sides was about the same, and once the war really started, the losses would be too great.

But.

The Daoshan True Kingdom has no rear protection, and the Tianhai Sect doesn't pay much attention to them, and they will inevitably be surpassed by the Forbidden Hall in the future, until one day, the Daoshan True Kingdom is broken, and the True Kingdom is completely destroyed.

Maybe it won't be long before this happens!

......

"Daoshan has been destroyed!"

Ye Tian was a little stunned when he heard the news.

He had never come into contact with characters such as Daoshan Daozu and the Forbidden Hall Master, but he had also heard many legends, but he didn't expect that a character like Daoshan Daozu would fall when he said that he would fall.

"The potential of Daoshan Dao Ancestor is still not very good, although it is the first Dao Ancestor in the Dao Mountain Realm, the pattern is too small, and it is too ordinary!"

Ye Tian muttered.

Ordinary just has no merits, and although the Forbidden Hall Lord has a big defect in the origin, he has mastered the power of the Dark Taboo, as long as he makes up for the defects, the future potential does not know how many streets there are to throw the Dao Dao Ancestor.

Therefore, it is not surprising that the hall master of the Forbidden Hall killed Daoshan Dao Ancestor.

After the Forbidden Hall Lord destroyed Dao Mountain, he didn't make any moves, and he didn't attack the other transcendent forces.

The Forbidden Temple didn't dare to go overboard, otherwise other forces would unite and the Forbidden Temple would not be able to defeat it.

For example, in the Temple of the Gods, there are not many top powerhouses, but the number of True Ancestors is too many, enough to rely on the number to suppress the Forbidden Palace.

Of course, the temples of the gods did not dare to provoke the Forbidden Palace, otherwise if the Lord of the Forbidden Hall assassinated, no one would be able to stop it.

With the passage of time, Daoshan was gradually forgotten, and the Forbidden Hall ushered in an outbreak, and its strength increased rapidly.

this day.

Ye Tian finally had a great news, his forbidden body had been raised to sixty percent.

This was mainly due to Ye Tian's realization of some forbidden paths, which caused him to absorb forbidden strange things many times faster than before, so the speed of refining the forbidden body was naturally faster.

With the help of a large number of forbidden strange things, he refined his forbidden body to sixty percent, and his strength also ushered in a small transformation.

According to Ye Tian's current strength, it is enough to compare with the ordinary Quadruple Heavenly Dao Ancestor, and he can easily kill the ultimate powerhouse of the invincible True Ancestor in seconds.

And Ye Tian also had a feeling that he was not very far from the extreme of the Supreme True Ancestor.

For example, no matter how he cultivated the forbidden technique now, the improvement of the power of the body, the power of the True Ancestor, and the power of the soul was still very slow, as if he was about to reach the limit.

And his Middle Thousand Dao Techniques have reached the limit level one by one, and he can't improve the Great Thousand Dao Techniques.

It can be said that Ye Tian can not improve much, so it is difficult to greatly improve his combat effectiveness.

Another period of tens of thousands of years has passed.

On this day, Ye Tian met Ouyang Jiu'er again.

At this time, he found that Ouyang Jiu'er had a lot of Dao-level natal talents, and he didn't ask.

But he felt that Ouyang Jiu'er's aura was much stronger than before, and he was afraid that he had reached the extreme of the Supreme True Ancestor, and he was even stronger than him.

"Jiu'er, have you reached the Supreme True Ancestor Extreme?"

Ye Tian asked.

"Well, I just arrived not long ago!" Ouyang Jiu'er said with a smile: "Brother Ye, I see that your strength is about to reach this level!"

"Almost, it will take a few million years!"

Ye Tian said with a sigh.

But suddenly, Ouyang Jiu'er said solemnly: "Brother Ye, you have to be careful, the Heavenly Emperor Palace has made a big move!"
